title: teucrium scordium subsp. scordium
intro: Teucrium scordium subsp. scordium, also known as wild marjoram or scordonia, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Teucrium scordium subsp. scordium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Teucrium scordium subsp. scordium can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and respiratory issues.
